raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The budget provides $4 million to bolster community-based nonprofits that provide trauma-informed services to vulnerable foster youth.",
    "The budget aims to ensure that group care facilities follow protocols for behavioral interventions and only call law enforcement as a last resort.",
    "An investment in a Student Authors Program will allow 1000 at-promise children in low-income communities to write and publish a short narrative to develop their literacy and entrepreneurial skills.",
    "Only 4% of former foster youth have earned a bachelor's degree or higher by age 26.",
```
